# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  parameters:
    vnetName: 'devVNET'
    location: 'eastus'
    webSubnetName: 'WebSubnet'
    appSubnetName: 'AppSubnet'
    dbSubnetName: 'DBSubnet'

  variables:
    addressSpace: '10.0.0.0/16'
    webSubnetPrefix: '10.0.1.0/24'
    appSubnetPrefix: '10.0.2.0/24'
    dbSubnetPrefix: '10.0.3.0/24'

  variables:
    vnet: {
      name: '[parameters('vnetName')]',
      location: '[parameters('location')]',
      addressSpace: '{variables(addressSpace)}',
      subnets: [
        {
          name: '[parameters('webSubnetName')]',
          addressPrefix: '[variables(webSubnetPrefix)]'
        },
        {
          name: '[parameters('appSubnetName')]',
          addressPrefix: '[variables(appSubnetPrefix)]'
        },
        {
          name: '[parameters('dbSubnetName')]',
          addressPrefix: '[variables(dbSubnetPrefix)]'
        }
      ]
    }

  resources:
    - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
      name: '[variables(vnet.name)]'
      apiVersion: '2019-10-01'
      location: '[parameters('location')]'
      properties:
        addressSpace: {variables(vnet.addressSpace)}
        subnets: [for subnet in variables(vnet.subnets):
                    {
                      name: '[subnet.name]',
                      addressPrefix: '[subnet.addressPrefix]'
                    }
                ]
